summary: Completed testing of held orders feature with stock reservation and POS page enhancements. All 55 backend tests passed. Frontend POS page verified with all new features working correctly: held orders with stock reservation, F-key labels on payment buttons, 3-line product name display with stock count, offline mode detection with product caching, and no receipt preview dialog after sale completion.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended (low priority)
Some products show negative stock values (e.g., stoc: -16) - this is a data issue from previous test runs, not a UI bug

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/held-orders - creates held order and deducts stock (200)
Backend: POST /api/held-orders with empty cart - returns 400 with error message
Backend: GET /api/held-orders - lists active held orders (200)
Backend: POST /api/held-orders/{id}/restore - restores order and gives stock back (200)
Backend: POST /api/held-orders/{id}/cancel - cancels order and restores stock (200)
Backend: POST /api/held-orders/{id}/restore with non-existent ID - returns 404
Backend: POST /api/held-orders/{id}/cancel with non-existent ID - returns 404
Backend: Held orders endpoints require authentication (403 without token)
Backend: Held order with discount field preserved
Backend: Sales API completes successfully without receipt preview
Frontend: POS page loads with product grid showing 100 products
Frontend: Product cards show 3-line product names with stock count (e.g., 'stoc: 0')
Frontend: F9 label visible on NUMERAR (cash) button
Frontend: F7 label visible on CARD button
Frontend: F11 label visible on ANULEAZA (cancel) button
Frontend: Bridge status indicator shows 'Casa deconectata' (expected)
Frontend: AȘTEAPTĂ button creates held order with toast 'Comanda pusa in asteptare - stoc rezervat'
Frontend: Held orders modal shows orders with 'Anuleaza' and 'Restaureaza' buttons
Frontend: Held orders modal shows order details (products, time, creator, price, expiry)
Frontend: Restore button loads held order items back into cart
Frontend: No receipt preview dialog after completing sale - sale completes directly
Frontend: Offline banner appears when browser goes offline with text 'Mod Offline - Vanzarile se salveaza local si se sincronizeaza automat'
Frontend: Products cached in localStorage (100 products) for offline use
Frontend: Offline banner disappears when back online with toast 'Conexiune restabilita - sincronizare...'
seed_data_creation: Created test held orders during API testing with automatic cleanup via cancel/restore operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Held orders feature fully tested. Key points: (1) POST /api/held-orders creates order and deducts stock immediately. (2) POST /api/held-orders/{id}/restore restores stock and returns order items for cart. (3) POST /api/held-orders/{id}/cancel restores stock and marks order cancelled. (4) Orders auto-expire after 24 hours (expire_old_held_orders function). (5) POS page shows F-key labels (F9=Cash, F7=Card, F11=Cancel). (6) Product names use 3-line clamp with tooltip. (7) Offline mode shows yellow banner and caches products in localStorage. (8) No receipt preview dialog after sale - sale completes directly with toast notification.

pos_no_receipt_preview.details: Sale completes directly without showing receipt preview dialog
